title: TUI Responsiveness And Interaction V2 Execution Root
description: Non-runnable feature container for the shared execution root covering manual-first refresh behavior, scroll-native detail rendering, deterministic mouse/keyboard interaction, incremental panel updates, regression coverage, and operator documentation.
acceptance_criteria: Feature tree coordinates implementation, testing, documentation, and review work for the TUI responsiveness iteration.
All runnable work for this spec is expressed in child beads rather than at the top level.
Planned scope stays limited to TUI runtime behavior, related tests, and README operator guidance.
